title: Guest vote attempt is gated and returns to feed for successful voting
description: Verifies a guest who attempts to vote is redirected to login, can authenticate, returns to the feed, and can successfully cast a vote with results displayed.

steps.description: Attempt to vote on a poll in the feed by selecting a poll option
Wait for the login page to load
Select a poll option to vote on the feed
Verify the poll results update is displayed for the voted poll

title: Unauthenticated user is redirected to login when visiting communities and returns after login
description: Verifies direct navigation to a protected route prompts login and, after authenticating, the user lands on the originally requested communities page with content loaded.

steps.description: Wait for the login page to load
Verify the user lands on the communities page and communities are displayed

title: Authenticated member can vote on a feed poll and sees immediate results
description: Verifies a logged-in member can vote on a poll from the home feed and immediately sees the poll results update.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to go to the home feed
Select a poll option to vote
Verify the poll results update is displayed for the voted poll

title: Authenticated member can join a community and see membership status update
description: Verifies a logged-in member can join a community from the communities page and the membership status updates in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to go to communities
Join a community from the list
Verify the selected community shows a joined or member state

title: Authenticated member can like and save a post on the feed and state persists on post detail
description: Verifies a logged-in member can like and save a post on the feed, then open the post detail and see the interaction states remain consistent.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to go to the home feed
Like the first post in the feed
Open the same post's detail view from the feed
Verify the post shows a liked state and a saved state on the post detail view

title: Authenticated member can like a post and see the like state update
description: Verifies a logged-in member can like a post in the feed and the UI updates to reflect the like state.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to go to the home feed
Like a post in the feed
Verify the post shows a liked visual state and an updated like count

title: Authenticated member can leave a community and see membership status revert
description: Verifies a logged-in member can join a community and then leave it, with the UI returning to a non-member state.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to go to communities
Join a community from the list
Verify the selected community shows a not-joined state

title: Authenticated member can save a post and see the saved state update
description: Verifies a logged-in member can save a post in the feed and the UI updates to reflect the saved state.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to go to the home feed
Save a post in the feed
Verify the post shows a saved visual state

title: Authenticated member can share a post link via clipboard
description: Verifies a logged-in member can share a post from the feed and receives a confirmation that the link was copied.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to go to the home feed
Share a post from the feed
Verify a copy-to-clipboard confirmation is visible
